name: LambdaTest
description: Monitor LambdaTest automated testing platform for cross-browser test coverage compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to LambdaTest at https://accounts.lambdatest.com
2. Go to Profile -> Access Key
3. Copy your Username and Access Key
4. Enter them below
